title: Fix stale-register detection
body: Register parsing drops the owner column on malformed rows.

- [x] config/triage.yaml ships with thresholds
- [x] docs/triage-thresholds.md created

title: Refactor the PubMed XML parser
body: Split the monolithic parser into per-element handlers.

title: In-flight retention/pruning policy
body: Old idea about pruning the in-flight queue.

title: New idea captured from a session
Add structured logging to the dispatch path
body:
## Problem
The dispatch path emits only unstructured print statements, so debugging a production incident means grepping free text with no request correlation.

## Outcome
Every dispatch emits one structured log line carrying request id, recipient, and latency.

Spec: docs/specs/logging.spec.md

- [ ] structured logger module
- [ ] wire the logger into the dispatch path

title: Patch the config loader
body: The config loader mishandles empty files.

title: Preserve ADO-shaped issue body formatting
body:
Problem

Azure DevOps stores work item descriptions as HTML-rich text. Arboretum should still recognize this shaped item as ready when it has enough body detail and a heading rendered as HTML.

Outcome

The maintain scan treats HTML headings the same way it treats Markdown headings for shaped horizon:next items.
